TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Hery Rajaonarimampianina == ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 11, Hery Rajaonarimampianina, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Madagascar ta' misuw hya' ga Hery Rajaonarimampianina, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan Hery Rajaonarimampianina sa kawas 2010, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ńßerj rajaonarimampianina == rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, ńßerj rajaonarimampianina, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ma*a…£as~…ē ¶~ ®ar ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ńßerj rajaonarimampianina, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan ńßerj rajaonarimampianina s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Hery Rajaonarimampianina == ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 11, Hery Rajaonarimampianina, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Madagascar ta' misuw hya' ga Hery Rajaonarimampianina, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan Hery Rajaonarimampianina sa kawas 2010, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ńßerj rajaonarimampianina == rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, ńßerj rajaonarimampianina, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē.
